saturated.example_hook: Join now and save — no join fee this month only.

avoid_themes: journey start without a specific problem
facility tour as the primary creative

opportunity_gaps.angle: Specific moment of re-entry after a gap
opportunity_gaps.rationale: No competitor is speaking to people who already tried the gym and stopped. This is the largest segment in Bloomington based on one-day-pass call data.
opportunity_gaps.suggested_hook: The moment you realized you couldn't keep up with your own kids.

opportunity_gaps.rationale: Every competitor sells the facility. Nobody is selling the experience of having someone notice when you stop showing up.
opportunity_gaps.suggested_hook: We built this entire first month around the specific reason you quit last time.

opportunity_gaps.rationale: Top objection is commitment resistance. Frame the gym as the solution to a mindset problem, not a fitness problem.
opportunity_gaps.suggested_hook: You're not lazy. You've just never had anyone notice when you stopped showing up.

recommendation_for_ahri: The three winning hooks already declared in brain-state are the right direction — none of them appear in competitor ads. Continue leading with the re-entry/coached angle. Do not test any hook that leads with price, season, or generic community. The identity reframe hook is the biggest whitespace opportunity in the Bloomington market.
